cache_node_type.description: Specifies the type of cache node, for example, cache.t2.micro.

duration.description: Indicates the reservation duration in years, such as 1 or 3.

offering_type.description: Defines the type of offering, such as 'All Upfront' or 'Partial Upfront'.

product_description.description: Describes the product that is being reserved, like 'redis' or 'memcached'.
